name: Stick Floor Lamp Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a cozy atmosphere in any corner of your home with this Stick Floor Lamp from Room Essentials™. This stick lamp has a sleek metal body with a pedestal base in a black finish and a white pleated cone-shaped shade for modern style and a soft glow. The floor lamp also sports a pull chain for easy on/off, while the five-foot cord allows for versatile placement in any room.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
